tours.src_name: Ha Long Bay Discovery Cruise — Canary Fixture
tours.src_subtitle: Luxury overnight cruise through World Heritage waters
tours.src_summary: A carefully curated 3-day voyage through the emerald waters of Ha Long Bay, Vietnam's most iconic UNESCO World Heritage Site. Guests are accommodated in private en-suite cabins aboard a boutique junk vessel hosting a maximum of twelve travellers. The itinerary balances guided excursions into sea caves and floating villages with unhurried private time on the sun deck.
src_highlights: Sunset cocktail hour on open deck
tours.src_itineraries: Day 1: Board vessel at noon, afternoon cruise through limestone karsts, welcome dinner. Day 2: Early kayaking excursion, cave exploration, afternoon at leisure, sunset cocktails. Day 3: Sunrise Tai Chi on deck, morning cruise, disembark by midday.

brand_brief.brand_guidelines: Sophisticated, understated tone. No superlatives unless earned. Respect the reader's intelligence and time.
